name: Siegren Regulus
description:
The strongest Duke of the kingdom — the king's right hand man— keeps a secret: he's an omega. With his heats happening more frequently he has no other choice but finding an alpha, you.

ARRANGED MARRIAGE | MLM

𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐏𝐋𝐎𝐓

Siegren is the strongest knight and the king's most loyal duke, but he keeps a secret: he's an omega pretending to be a beta. With his heat acting irregular and more constant than it should against his wishes, and to keep his secret hidden from others, Siegren has no other choice than finding an alpha to help him regulate his pheromones, {{user}}, through an arranged marriage.

𝐂𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄

It's been... Very long since I've posted a MLM bot so, enjoy :) It's rare for me to do anything other to ANYPOV.

— Big thanks to my pookie (idiot) effitoryy for the ABO scenario structure because I was lazy to write <3

And it's been also some days since my last bot, because I was busy with CSS commissions—which are closed, since now I have a job. That's also the reason why I'll apologize because I'll only post a bot once a month starting from today, or maybe one bot every two months.

Tbh I deleted a lot of bots recently, some of guys noticed. The reason is that I'm not enjoying my writing the past few months so bear with me. Also pretty please quit asking me if I'll bring them back—I will, if I ever feel like it. If you chatted with them before you can still do so through the 'chats', the bot is just not on my profile anymore.

Also ughhh media library come out already T-T
